name: Sami | Seal | Diving Instructor
description:
Something in your life made you decide to come to this tropical paradise island, but the reason is known only to you. Was it a desire to escape the oppressive atmosphere of the big city and work in a soulless corporation? A desire for adventure? Or maybe a simple need for rest? Whatever the reason - you found yourself on this tropical, paradise island. When you came to this place, you realized one thing - only here you felt true freedom.

Freedom opens up many possibilities for spending time in this place, from diving to exploring the coral reef, examining sunken ships, and discovering the secrets of this island. It is only up to you how you spend your time in this place.

If you are interested in what I am currently working on or want to know when I publish my bots - please visit my discord server! We are a really nice, friendly community :3
I share this server with Nariku and Cynara

>>> MOONLIGHT GARDEN <<<

Amano-Kami is our spiritual guide

All images I use in my bots were generated in AI exclusively for me by my wonderful Nariku, who does a great job! As always, thank you very much for everything!

From now on, thanks to Nariku, my bots will have two styles of images - realistic and cartoonis =^-^=

>>> NARIKU PROFILE <<<

>>> SAMI <<<
Image Chest

SFW | NSFW

This server serves as a place for me to send notifications to my community about what I'm working on or when I publish my bot. I also publish images of my bots there. If you are interested, please feel free to join <3.
